title: Hassall Developments Pty Ltd — Public safety
investigation_objective: The NSW Office of the Building Commissioner secured an enforceable undertaking (October 2023) from Hassall Developments Pty Ltd, developer of two 22-storey 'Imperial Towers' apartment buildings at 9 Hassall Street, Parramatta, after finding serious structural, waterproofing and fire-safety defects that had led to a prohibition order in 2021. Under the undertaking, the company committed to remediate all serious defects and to unwind off-the-plan purchaser contracts, including returning deposits, with a 10-year resale restriction on the affected units.
scope: Regulator found serious structural, waterproofing and fire-safety defects sufficient to warrant a prohibition order; Entered an enforceable undertaking to remediate defects and unwind purchaser contracts; Ten-year resale restriction imposed on affected apartments as part of the undertaking
